residue_numbering: 1-indexed positions in the 266-aa ProteinGym target sequence
source: Conserved B1 metallo-beta-lactamase active-site and zinc-binding motif mapping plus transparent +/-2 residue windows.
evidence: The active_site_neighborhood group is a +/-2 residue window around the curated VIM-2 metal-binding/catalytic-site residues. The curated_metal_binding_site group is the exact motif-derived site. No structure-derived ligand-contact group is included yet; that should be added after a VIM-2 structure and ligand/contact rule are selected.
